CONTENT.Career: A youth product of Pérez Galdós and Leganés, Santos joined the youth academy of Real Madrid in 2012. He worked his way up their youth categories, and was promoted to their reserves in 2020. He made his professional debut with Real Madrid in a 6–1 La Liga win over Mallorca on 22 September 2021.On 21 July 2022, Santos was loaned to Segunda División side CD Mirandés for the season. In the summer of 2023, he moved to Real Murcia.
CONTENT.Honours: Real Madrid Juvenil AUEFA Youth League: 2019–20

SUMMARY: Sergio Santos Fernández (born 3 January 2001) is a Spanish professional footballer who mainly plays as a right-back for Algeciras, on loan from Real Murcia.
